BearWare.WebRTCAudioPreprocessor.NoiseSuppression Struct Reference

Configuration of WebRTC's noise suppression. See also BearWare.SpeexDSP. More...

Public Attributes

bool bEnable
 Enable WebRTC noise suppression.
 
int nLevel
 Noise suppression level. 0 = Low, 1 = Moderate, 2 = High, 3 = VeryHigh. Default: 1.
 

Detailed Description

Configuration of WebRTC's noise suppression. See also BearWare.SpeexDSP.
